challenges.title: Fade-In Button
challenges.description: Create a button that fades in with opacity 0 to 1 on page load using a transition delay.
challenges.hint: Use an animation or a class toggled after load, combined with transition: opacity 0.5s ease.
challenges.expected_outcome: A button that smoothly fades into view.

challenges.title: Background Color Transition
challenges.description: Create a div that transitions its background color from blue to red when hovered.

solution.css: .box { width: 100px; height: 100px; background: blue; transition: background-color 0.3s ease; } .box:hover { background: red; }

challenges.title: Smooth Card Lift
challenges.description: Create a card that lifts up with a shadow effect on hover using transform and box-shadow transitions.
challenges.hint: Transition both transform (translateY) and box-shadow properties.
challenges.expected_outcome: Card smoothly lifts with a shadow.

solution.css: .card { transition: transform 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease; } .card:hover { transform: translateY(-8px); box-shadow: 0 12px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.2); }

challenges.title: Staggered Navigation Items
challenges.description: Create a nav list where each item slides in with a staggered delay (each item 0.1s after the previous).

solution.css: .nav-item { opacity: 0; transform: translateX(-20px); transition: all 0.3s ease; } .nav-item:nth-child(1) { transition-delay: 0.1s; } .nav-item:nth-child(2) { transition-delay: 0.2s; } .nav-item.active { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(0); }

challenges.title: Elastic Bouncing Ball
challenges.description: Create a ball that drops and bounces using a custom cubic-bezier timing function.
challenges.hint: Use cubic-bezier with overshoot values and transform translateY.
challenges.expected_outcome: Ball drops with an elastic bounce effect.

solution.css: .ball { width: 50px; height: 50px; border-radius: 50%; background: orange; transition: transform 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.68, -0.55, 0.27, 1.55); } .ball.drop { transform: translateY(300px); }
